message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class View << (C,#b7d7b7) >>
class ViewGroup << (C,#b7d7b7) >>
class ImageView << (C,#b7d7b7) >>
class RecyclerView << (C,#b7d7b7) >>
class LinearLayout << (C,#b7d7b7) >>
class CircleImageView << (C,#b7d7b7) >>

ViewGroup --|> View
ImageView --|> View

RecyclerView --|> ViewGroup
LinearLayout --|> ViewGroup

CircleImageView --|> ImageView

@enduml
